title: ITEC 2026 — Beijing Chaoyang International Talent Entrepreneurship Conference
desc: 14th edition. Prize + Investment + Loan triple engine. Three tracks: Talent, Industry, Special.
highlights: ¥54.5M total prize pool with 86 award slots
CICC Capital, Hillhouse, Plum Ventures investment consortium
Policy matching, landing services, office space included
Special track for robotics, photonics, and disruptive tech
titleCN: 2026北京朝阳国际人才创业大会（ITEC）

title: Shenzhen International Innovation Competition (10th Edition)
desc: 12 overseas branch stations. One of China's largest and most rewarding competitions for global innovators.
highlights: 12 overseas stations: Boston, London, Paris, Toronto, Sydney + 7 more
Grand Prize: ¥1.5M (¥500K immediate + ¥1M landing fund)
¥5B venture capital pool from 20+ leading VCs
Up to 24 months free workspace across 434 startup spaces
titleCN: 第10届深圳国际创新大赛

title: Jiangsu Talent Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition 2026
desc: 5 overseas divisions. Winners get direct access to Jiangsu's Dual Innovation Plan interview.
highlights: 5 overseas divisions: Munich, Boston, LA, Melbourne, Seoul
Two categories: Innovation (pre-registration) & Entrepreneurship (registered)
Direct access to provincial talent program interviews
Priority recommendation for national-level programs

title: 12th China Returnee Entrepreneurship Competition & International Sci-Tech Contest

International Sci-Tech Talent China Tour program
Suzhou biotech and semiconductor ecosystem matchmaking

title: Hefei Global 'Kepiao' Innovation Competition 2026
prize: Free housing + rent subsidy + funding matching
desc: 15 days free accommodation for all qualifying teams. No overseas vs. domestic split.
highlights: 15 days free accommodation for all qualifying teams
Up to 6 months rent subsidy + free coworking desk
Single track for all teams — online pitch via Tencent Meeting
Entry into USTC Silicon Valley Project Library for ongoing matchmaking

title: Huachuang Star 2026 — National Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition (3rd Edition)
prize: Multi-city prizes + landing support per city
desc: One application, 14 Chinese cities + overseas tracks. 10 industry tracks.
highlights: 14 hub cities: Shanghai, Beijing, Shenzhen, Wuhan, Hangzhou, Hefei, Chengdu + more
10 industry tracks covering AI, biotech, new materials, traditional industries
Two pathways: Team Group (pre-registration) / Enterprise Group (registered)
Test multiple ecosystems with one application

title: Win in Guangzhou + Jingu Cup — GBA Innovation Competition
desc: Investment-as-award model. Three tracks: Seed, Startup, Growth.
highlights: Investment-as-award model + cash prizes up to ¥50K
Three categories: Seed (0-3yr), Startup (3-5yr), Growth (5yr+)
Greater Bay Area ecosystem access
Government support for landing in Guangzhou

title: Xiamen 'Talents Gather in Fujian' Global Innovation Competition
prize: ~¥4M pool + ¥100K settlement bonus (30% extra for foreign nationals)
desc: Provincial B-level talent recognition. 30% bonus for foreign nationals.

30% additional bonus for foreign national winners
Focus on Electronics & IT, Biotech, Advanced Manufacturing
Fujian provincial government backing

title: Startup in Shanghai 2026
prize: Free office space + innovation fund (¥5M+ angel required)
desc: 14th edition. Nearly 70,000 tech companies since 2012 — 94 have gone public. CLOSED for 2026.
